[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011011100 5
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 001010110 4
7 111010111 7

01 10 001010110 4 match 6
12 21 111000110 5
23 32 011000000 2
34 43 011100001 4
45 54 011100001 4
56 65 111100001 5
67 76 011010000 3
70 07 001010100 3

02 20 001000110 3
13 31 011000001 3
24 42 011000000 2
35 53 011100001 4
46 64 011100001 4
57 75 011001100 4
60 06 001010000 2
71 17 011010100 4

03 30 001000000 1
14 41 011000001 3
25 52 111001110 6
36 63 011100001 4
47 74 011000000 2
50 05 001000110 3
61 16 111010001 5
72 27 011001100 4

04 40 001000000 1
15 51 111000111 6
26 62 111000000 3
37 73 011000000 2
